title: Module Manifest
description: Canonical contract definition for a module inside the spectrum-systems platform. Each module must declare its identity, boundaries, dependencies, and forbidden responsibilities.

module_id.description: Unique stable identifier for this module, using snake_case dot-path notation (e.g., shared.artifact_models).

module_name.description: Human-readable display name for the module.

module_type.description: Architectural layer this module belongs to.

owner_layer.description: Top-level directory path within spectrum_systems/ that owns this module (e.g., shared, control_plane).

inputs.description: Canonical artifact or data model names consumed by this module.

outputs.description: Canonical artifact or data model names produced by this module.

dependencies.description: module_id values of other modules this module directly depends on.

lifecycle_stages.description: Lifecycle stages this module participates in (e.g., draft, active, deprecated).

authoritative_imports.description: Shared structures or contracts this module is expected to import from the shared layer rather than define locally.

forbidden_responsibilities.description: Explicit list of responsibilities this module does NOT own and must not implement. Must be non-empty.

status.description: Current implementation status of this module.

description.description: Concise statement of what this module does and its purpose within the platform.

schema_version.description: Version of the module-manifest schema used by this manifest.
